entries.title: Oi prefix on all public symbols
entries.description: Every public widget, class, enum, and extension uses the Oi prefix. Classes are named by what they are in the UI (OiTable, OiButton, OiSidebar).

entries.title: Props read like English
entries.description: Props are named as readable English phrases (multiSelect: true, reorderColumns: true, stickyHeader: true) rather than technical abbreviations or opaque identifiers.

entries.title: Required props enforce correctness
entries.description: Images require alt, buttons (all variants including .icon()) require label, icons require label. These are enforced as Dart required named parameters.

entries.title: Factory constructors for variants
entries.description: OiButton provides factory constructors for each variant: primary(), secondary(), outline(), ghost(), destructive(), soft(), icon(), split(), countdown(), confirm().

entries.title: Callbacks are verbs
entries.description: All callback parameters use the on + verb pattern (onTap, onSave, onSort, onReorder, onChanged, onSubmitted, etc.).

entries.title: Booleans are descriptive
entries.description: Boolean parameters use descriptive adjective/noun names (enabled, dismissible, searchable, loading) rather than is/has-prefixed names.
issues: lib/src/modules/oi_activity_feed.dart:212 — internal _OiActivityFeedList constructor still uses `required this.hasMore` while the field at line 221 was renamed to `final bool moreAvailable`; this is an incomplete fix that produces a Dart compile error (field `hasMore` does not exist)
lib/src/modules/oi_activity_feed.dart:291,299 — internal _OiActivityEventTile has `required this.isLast` (constructor) and `final bool isLast` (field); not fixed from cycle 1
lib/src/foundation/oi_accessibility.dart:57 — public static method OiA11y.announce() has named param `bool isAssertive`; should be `assertive`
lib/src/composites/data/oi_tree.dart:142,145 — method return types `bool isExpanded()` and `bool isSelected()` caught by naming convention test regex
lib/src/composites/navigation/oi_sidebar.dart:346,377,475 — local method parameters `bool isCollapsed`, `bool isCompact`, `bool isSelected` caught by naming convention test regex
lib/src/modules/oi_kanban.dart:177 — local method parameter `bool isCollapsed` caught by naming convention test regex
Naming convention tests added but BOTH fail: test 1 (bool field prefix) and test 2 (constructor param prefix) both report violations
Coverage tracking JSON files for REQ-0015, REQ-0016, REQ-0017 still absent

testSummary: 2417 tests run, 4 failed. 2 failures are in test/src/naming_conventions_test.dart (both boolean naming convention tests fail): (1) 'no public bool field is prefixed with is or has' fails with 8 violations including oi_activity_feed.dart:299 final bool isLast, oi_tree.dart method return types, oi_sidebar.dart and oi_kanban.dart local params, oi_accessibility.dart:57 bool isAssertive; (2) 'no constructor parameter uses this.isXxx or this.hasXxx' fails with oi_activity_feed.dart:212 required this.hasMore and oi_activity_feed.dart:291 required this.isLast. The other 2 failures are in OiFileExplorerSettings tests unrelated to EPIC-0003.
